name: PELOTON INTERACTIVE, INC.
business: Peloton sells connected fitness hardware (Bike, Bike+, Tread, Tread+, Row, Guide) and subscriptions (All-Access, Peloton Apps) to individuals and businesses. As of June 30, 2025, it has approximately 6 million Members across the US, UK, Canada, Germany, Australia, and Austria.
sellsTo: B2B clients (hospitality, multi-family residential, gyms, education, corporate wellness, healthcare, community wellness)

exposures.sentence: We use AI and machine learning (ML) to power proprietary personalization and discovery models across all our software platforms.

catalysts.sentence: We expect the 2025 Restructuring Plan to be substantially implemented by the end of fiscal year 2026, which is subject to change.
